LOTM.Settings.AutomationLevel.Name: Automation Level
LOTM.Settings.AutomationLevel.Hint: Controls how aggressively rolls and resource/corruption effects are automated.
LOTM.Settings.ShowRollBreakdown.Name: Show Roll Breakdown
LOTM.Settings.ShowRollBreakdown.Hint: Show component-level roll details in LoTM chat cards.
LOTM.Settings.WorldSchemaVersion.Name: LoTM World Schema Version
LOTM.Settings.AutoOrganizeCompendiums.Hi: Automatically organize system compendium entries into folders on world ready.
